title: Stranger Things
description: This is the very first stranger things minecraft resorce pack (CHANGES GUI AND ENVIROMENT)
body:
Thematic Overhaul: The menus, inventory screens, and other in-game interfaces are often redesigned to reflect the 1980s aesthetic of Stranger Things. This might involve different color palettes (think darker, more muted tones or neon accents), pixel art styles reminiscent of the era, and unique fonts that evoke the show's title card or general vibe.
